attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
 ,NBM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
 ,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT               
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
 ,NBM.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,NBM.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
 ,NBM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
 ,NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
 ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG
 ,NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 ,NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 /*OA Q1FY15 changes */
 NBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 /*OA Q1FY15 changes */
,NBM.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,NBM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE NBM
 WHERE DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN (
 (
 SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY 
 WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG     ='Y'   
 AND   DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID NOT IN 
 (
 SELECT DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR 
 WHERE DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID IN (
 SELECT DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID              
 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY 
 WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG           ='Y'   )) ))

SELECT
  NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
 ,NBM.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
 ,NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
 ,NBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT               
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT   
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT        
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT 
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT   
 ,NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
 ,NBM.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,NBM.EDW_UPDATE_USER               
 ,NBM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
 ,NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
 ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG
 ,NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 ,NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, /*added as part of TRUE DEMAND*/
 /*OA Q1FY15 changes */
 NBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 /*OA Q1FY15 changes */
,NBM.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
,NBM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /*Added as part of NRS PI3 changes*/
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE NBM
 WHERE DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN (
 SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY 
 WHERE DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID IN 
 (
 SELECT DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_QUARTER_TO_YEAR 
 WHERE DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID IN (
 SELECT DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID              
 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY 
 WHERE PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG           ='Y'   )) )
